# Install `ai-chat` — AI Chat — Workbench / Sidebar / Search

> One conversational AI feature, three render modes.

📚 Knowledge base : https://resource.rahmanef.com/llms.txt
📦 Slice detail   : https://resource.rahmanef.com/slices/ai-chat
🧠 JSON catalog   : https://resource.rahmanef.com/api/knowledge?slice=ai-chat
🤖 Prompt page    : https://resource.rahmanef.com/agents/ai-chat

## 1. Install

```bash
npx rahman-resources add ai-chat
# alias: npx rr add ai-chat
```

## 2. What it ships

- tags: `ai`, `ai:chat`, `streaming`, `multimodal`, `tool-calls`, `agent-mode`, `rag`, `citations`, `branching`, `history`

## 3. Wire it up

Run `npx rr add ai-chat`. Pick `mode="workbench" | "sidebar" | "search"` on `<AIChat />` (or use the convenience exports `<AIChatWorkbench />`, `<AIChatSidebar />`, `<AIChatSearch />`). Same backend tables + streaming action for all three.

## Rules of engagement

- shadcn-only UI primitives. No raw `<button>` / `<dialog>` / native date or file inputs.
- 200-line hard cap per source file (extract neighbours when over).
- All Convex queries hit an index (`.withIndex(...)`); never bare `.collect()`.
- Public mutations/queries declare `args:` validators + authz.
- Full ruleset: https://resource.rahmanef.com/best-practice
